r-publication-graphs-tables
  • Home
  • About

On this page

  • Install and load packages
  • Example data used

Publication Ready Graphs and Tables in R

Note that this workshops assumes a working knowledge of R; we will dive straight into main table content without a general overview of R.

Install and load packages

This workshop will use the packages tidyverse (for data manipulation and plotting), gtsummary (for table formatting) and medicaldata for example datasets.

library(tidyverse)
library(gtsummary)
library(medicaldata)

Example data used

This session will use example datasets included in the gtsummary and medicaldata packages.

Load the [trial dataset] (https://www.danieldsjoberg.com/gtsummary/reference/trial.html?q=trial#ref-usage) and cytomegalovirus data

A data frame with 200 rows–one row per patient

trt - Chemotherapy Treatment

age - Age

marker - Marker Level (ng/mL)

stage - T Stage

grade - Grade

response - Tumor Response

death - Patient Died

ttdeath - Months to Death/Censor

trial
# A tibble: 200 × 8
   trt      age marker stage grade response death ttdeath
   <chr>  <dbl>  <dbl> <fct> <fct>    <int> <int>   <dbl>
 1 Drug A    23  0.16  T1    II           0     0    24  
 2 Drug B     9  1.11  T2    I            1     0    24  
 3 Drug A    31  0.277 T1    II           0     0    24  
 4 Drug A    NA  2.07  T3    III          1     1    17.6
 5 Drug A    51  2.77  T4    III          1     1    16.4
 6 Drug B    39  0.613 T4    I            0     1    15.6
 7 Drug A    37  0.354 T1    II           0     0    24  
 8 Drug A    32  1.74  T1    I            0     1    18.4
 9 Drug A    31  0.144 T1    II           0     0    24  
10 Drug B    34  0.205 T3    I            0     1    10.5
# ℹ 190 more rows
cytomegalovirus
